description: Autoshaping (sign-tracking): forward-delay CS-US pairing with localized CS (Brown & Jenkins, 1968). The emergent key-peck is Pavlovian, not operant — no response contingency is programmed; US delivery is contingent on CS offset alone.
_note: Composed procedure: CS-US pairing hosted inside an experiment phase. No operant response is required; the emergent key-peck would be recorded as an observable rather than a programmed response class.
